useSwipeRow — open panel tap does not fire onPrimary
does not call onPrimary when tapping slider while panel is already open
snaps closed when tapping slider while panel is open
useSwipeRow — shouldFireTap
returns true when movement is under 4px
returns false after a significant swipe
income store: loadNextPage()
appends items and advances page
deduplicates by id across pages
does not fetch when loading is already in progress
income store: add()
resets and reloads on success
shows error toast and rethrows on failure
income store: patch()
resets and reloads on success
income store: remove()
resets and reloads on success
income store: reset()
clears items, page, and hasMore
receipt queue store: enqueue / list / remove
enqueue persists item with a generated client_receipt_id and exposes it via items
multiple enqueues accumulate; remove deletes by id
different URLs produce different client_receipt_ids
same URL produces the same client_receipt_id (stable hash)
enqueuing the same URL twice only adds one entry and second call returns false
refresh re-reads items from IndexedDB
count returns the number of pending items
InlineCreateEvent
emits cancel when the Cancel button is clicked
shows an error when name is empty and Add is clicked
shows an error when to-date is before from-date
emits save with correct payload on valid form
includes tag names in auto_tags when tags are selected
BaseSheet — visibility
renders the sheet when open is true
does not render the sheet when open is false
BaseSheet — slots
renders header slot content
renders default slot content in sheet-body
renders footer slot inside sheet-footer when provided
omits sheet-footer when no footer slot is provided
renders pre-body slot between header and body
BaseSheet — close events
emits close when the close button is clicked
emits close when the scrim is clicked
BaseSheet — dimmed modifier
adds sheet-dimmed class when dimmed prop is true
does not add sheet-dimmed when dimmed is false
BaseSheet — fullHeight modifier
adds sheet-full class when fullHeight is true
BaseSheet — tall modifier
adds sheet-tall class when tall is true
reportNetworkFailure
does nothing below threshold
triggers SW reset and reload after 3 consecutive failures
unregisters all SW registrations before reload
does nothing when no SW controller
does nothing when offline
does not reload a second time if sw_reset_attempted is already set
sets sw_reset_attempted before reloading to prevent loops
reportNetworkSuccess
resets the failure counter so 3 more failures are needed to trigger reset
TemplatePreviewPicker
renders a chip for every template
shows the full preview (all groups + all visible categories) for the first template
clicking a chip swaps the detail panel to that template's preview
apply emits the selected code
apply is disabled when the selected set is already active
re-localizes the preview when lang changes
InlineCreateRow
renders an input with the given placeholder
emits save with trimmed value on Enter
emits cancel when Esc is pressed
emits cancel on the × button
emits save on the ✓ button
emits cancel instead of save when value is empty
shows validation error and blocks save when validate returns a message
clears validation error and emits save on valid input
receipt queue durability
item survives store re-instantiation (page reload simulation)
offline enqueue survives store re-instantiation
item not lost when flush errors
TemplateSwitchSheet
loads the template catalog when opened
apply switches the template, persists the language, and closes the sheet
renders nothing when closed
useKeyboardVisible
starts with keyboard not visible
detects keyboard open when viewport shrinks below threshold
computes keyboardBottom as gap between viewport top and keyboard
resets to not visible when viewport restores to full height
removes event listeners on unmount
does nothing when visualViewport is absent
CategoryQuickPicks — pill tap emits select
emits select with category id when pill is clicked
emits select with correct id for second pill
CategoryQuickPicks — no search button
does not render a search icon button
does not define a search emit
CategoryQuickPicks — selected highlight
marks the matching pill is-selected when selectedCategoryId matches
marks no pill when selectedCategoryId is null
marks no pill when selectedCategoryId does not match any category
updates the highlight when selectedCategoryId prop changes
useOnline
reflects navigator.onLine on mount when true
reflects navigator.onLine on mount when false
updates to false when offline event fires
updates to true when online event fires
removes event listeners on unmount
income API URLs
listIncomes GETs /api/incomes with page params
listIncomes defaults to page=1 page_size=20
createIncome POSTs to /api/incomes with body
updateIncome PATCHes /api/incomes/{id} with body
deleteIncome DELETEs /api/incomes/{id}
fetchCurrencies
GETs /api/currencies and returns the parsed body
throws an Error with detail when the server returns 5xx
addCurrency
POSTs the uppercased code
rejects empty / non-string codes before calling fetch
deleteCurrency
propagates the 409 error from the server
DELETEs the URL-encoded uppercased code
CurrencyAmountRow — rendering
shows the currency code on the pill
falls back to RSD when currency is empty
shows the amount value in the input
does not render the picker by default
CurrencyAmountRow — interactions
opens the picker when pill is clicked
closes the picker on second pill click
emits update:amount when the input changes
HeaderSegmented — all five tabs render
renders all five tab buttons
no overflow button or dropdown
HeaderSegmented — active state
marks add active when tab=add
marks review active when tab=review
marks analytics active when tab=analytics
marks income active when tab=income
marks llm active when tab=llm
HeaderSegmented — emit
emits update:tab='add' on click
emits update:tab='review' on click
emits update:tab='analytics' on click
emits update:tab='income' on click
emits update:tab='llm' on click
HeaderSegmented — badge
hides badge when showBadge is false
shows badge with ! on review tab when showBadge is true
badge has aria-label 'review attention' when shown
badge is on the review button
TagPicker
renders a chip per tag
marks chips checked when their id is in modelValue
emits update:modelValue with the toggled set on click
removes from selection when clicking a checked chip
renders empty hint when there are no tags
ScopeSelector — rendering
renders one radio per option
renders option labels
marks the current modelValue as checked
marks 'single' checked by default
ScopeSelector — emit
emits update:modelValue when a radio changes
apiRequest error handling
throws with string detail from server
extracts msg from first pydantic validation error (array detail)
falls back to HTTP status when detail array has no msg
falls back to HTTP status when body has no detail
returns parsed JSON on success
legacy-pwa-cleanup
deletes only legacy dinary-* caches, leaves Workbox caches
sets the persistence flag so the sweep is one-shot
does not throw when caches API is unavailable
is a no-op when the flag is already set
isFiscalReceiptUrl
recognizes the suf.purs.gov.rs host
returns false for non-strings
parseReceiptUrl
extracts amount (in 1/10000 of a unit) and date from a known payload
throws when the vl parameter is missing
LLM provider API URLs
createProvider POSTs to /api/llm/providers
updateProvider PATCHes /api/llm/providers/{id}
deleteProvider DELETEs /api/llm/providers/{id}
getStatus GETs /api/llm/status
recordOutOfSetActivation
records activations without toasting below the threshold
raises the persistent nudge banner and resets the counter on the 3rd activation within 30 days
prunes activations older than 30 days before counting
addResultMessage
returns the right wording for each kind/status
returns null for unknown kinds or statuses
returns null for created (the unsurprising happy path)
validateTagName
rejects empty input
rejects names containing spaces or commas
TAG_NAME_DISALLOWED_RE matches whitespace and commas
accepts valid names
review API URLs
getReviewFeed GETs /api/rules/feed with page params and doubtful_only
getReviewFeed defaults to page=1 page_size=20 doubtful_only=true
confirmAllRules POSTs to /api/rules/confirm-all with rule_ids
toast store
show() makes the toast visible with the given type and message
auto-hides after 3000ms for short messages, 8000ms for long
show() while another toast is visible replaces it and resets the timer
hide() cancels the timer and clears visibility
HealthSummaryCard — counts
shows healthy / total counts
shows 0 / 0 when health is null
HealthSummaryCard — status dot
renders dot-ok when healthy > 0
renders dot-error when healthy is 0
renders dot-off when health is null
HealthSummaryCard — add button
emits add when the + button is clicked
StatusDot
renders the correct class for kind=ok
renders the correct class for kind=rate_limited
renders the correct class for kind=off
renders the correct class for kind=error
defaults to off when no kind is supplied
is aria-hidden
